The '''''Borleias''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troop transport based on [[Folor]]. When [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Apwar Trigit]] attacked the base, the transport was delayed in evacuating by an engine malfunction. Luckily for the crew, the newly-formed [[Wraith Squadron]] was able to buy time for them to escape. It later delivered supplies to the captured [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
